title: FTL Postmortem: Designing Without a Pitch
creator: Matthew Davis and Justin Ma
description: Subset Games’ founders explain how a small prototype made for themselves became FTL, covering influences, remote collaboration, iteration, public response, crowdfunding, and decisions made without a conventional publisher pitch.
useful: A candid small-team production history that separates the appealing finished game from the uncertainty of finding it.
audience: Independent developers studying prototypes, collaboration, crowdfunding, and emergent project direction.
learning: Trace a personal prototype into a commercial project
See how feedback and funding changed production
Identify benefits and risks of designing without a formal pitch
